headline: Hormel Foods Corp (NYSE:HRL) Screens as a Dividend Candidate with High Yield and History
summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) offers a high 4.84% dividend yield with a reliable payment history, supported by stable earnings and a solid balance sheet for income-focused investors.
